case_title: THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC VS. JORGE FERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, JORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 124 TURK STREET, #209, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
